topic: warm climate and lower natural grape acidity
trigger_keywords: clima favorece vinos con menor acidez natural

steps.label: cause
steps.text: Grapes ripen under consistently warm temperatures.

steps.label: mechanism
steps.text: Warm conditions accelerate respiration, particularly the consumption of malic acid, as ripening advances.

steps.label: effect
steps.text: Natural grape acidity tends to be lower than in otherwise comparable cooler conditions.

steps.label: exam_formulation
steps.text: Formative causal formulation: Natural grape acidity tends to be lower than in otherwise comparable cooler conditions.

_meta.source_note: Inferred formative model - not official WSET assessment or mark-scheme content
